query:
UPDATE resources
            SET
                account_id = $2,
                api_version = $3,
                resource_name = $4,
                description = $5,
                labels = $6,
                annotations = $7,
                spec = $8,
                status = $9,
                generation = $10,
                updated_at = $11,
                deleted_at = $12,
                last_reconciled_at = $13,
                last_event_id = $14
            WHERE resource_id = $1
              AND (
                    last_event_id IS NULL AND CAST($15 as BIGINT) IS NULL OR
                    last_event_id IS NOT NULL AND CAST($15 as BIGINT) IS NOT NULL AND last_event_id = $15
              )
